title: [VPlan] Fix convertToPhisToBlends folding non poison blend to poison
author: lukel97
description:
This fixes a miscompile in #180005 where we didn't check that the first incoming value isn't poison.

We should use the first non-poison incoming value if it exists, or just poison if all the incoming values are poison.

tests.test_body:
define void @blend_poison_first_argument(ptr %p, i1 %c) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %latch ]
  br i1 %c, label %if, label %latch

if:                                               ; preds = %loop
  br label %latch

latch:                                            ; preds = %if, %loop
  %blend = phi i64 [ %iv, %loop ], [ poison, %if ]
  %gep = getelementptr i64, ptr %p, i64 %iv
  store i64 %blend, ptr %gep, align 4
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %ec = icmp ult i64 %iv, 31
  br i1 %ec, label %loop, label %exit

exit:                                             ; preds = %latch
  ret void
}

define void @blend_all_poison(ptr %p, i1 %c) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %latch ]
  br i1 %c, label %if, label %latch

if:                                               ; preds = %loop
  br label %latch

latch:                                            ; preds = %if, %loop
  %blend = phi i64 [ poison, %loop ], [ poison, %if ]
  %gep = getelementptr i64, ptr %p, i64 %iv
  store i64 %blend, ptr %gep, align 4
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %ec = icmp ult i64 %iv, 31
  br i1 %ec, label %loop, label %exit

exit:                                             ; preds = %latch
  ret void
}
